task_completion.description: Set the dive depth to 50 meters and bottom time to 20 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the dive planner waypoints or parameters, the depth should be set to 50m and the duration/time should be set to 20 minutes.

task_completion.description: Configure the bottom gas as Trimix 21/35.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the gas configuration section of the planner, there should be an entry for Trimix 21/35, showing 21% O2 and 35% He.

task_completion.description: Configure the decompression gas as EAN50.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the gas configuration section of the planner, there should be an entry for EAN50, showing 50% O2.

task_completion.description: Set the bottom SAC rate to 20 L/min and deco SAC rate to 15 L/min.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the planner settings or dive parameters, the Bottom SAC rate should be visible as 20 L/min and the Deco SAC rate as 15 L/min.
A dive profile graph should be visible showing a descent to 50m, a bottom phase, and a stepped ascent indicating calculated decompression stops.

task_completion.description: Save the planned dive to the logbook.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly planned 50m dive should appear as an entry in the main dive list/logbook view of the application.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Subsurface GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Subsurface application window being used, not a terminal, script editor, or text editor modifying the .ssrf file directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the built-in dive planner to calculate the profile.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dive profile graph should be a system-generated plot with proper deco steps, not manually drawn or typed text masquerading as a plan.

integrity.description: The agent did not fake the results using image manipulation or text replacement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The fonts, UI elements, and layout of the Subsurface application should look consistent and native, without signs of pasted text over the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires planning an open-circuit dive in Subsurface. Verify the following exact parameters: Depth = 50m, Bottom Time = 20 minutes, Bottom Gas = Trimix 21/35 (21% O2, 35% He), Deco Gas = EAN50 (50% O2), Bottom SAC = 20 L/min, Deco SAC = 15 L/min. The final step requires saving the generated plan to the logbook.
